title: Earrings.
content:
Why wore th' Egyptians jewels in the ear?
    But for to teach us, all the grace is there,
    When we obey, by acting what we hear.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Earrings.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
